blocks.content: My engineering skills include robotics, control systems, mechanical design, technical report writing, FMEA, Solidworks, Ansys, multibody simulation, interference analysis, and Digital Mock-Up workflows.
My computing toolkit includes deep learning, language models, computer vision, PyTorch, TensorFlow, ROS, ROS2, Gazebo, Webots, MATLAB, Python, and C++.
I work with PID, LQR, LQG, Kalman filtering, Lyapunov stability reasoning, Monte Carlo optimization, and output feedback design.
My computational geometry work includes octrees, Hilbert curves, space partitioning, trunk packing reasoning, and geometry-aware optimization.
